_description: Per Issue #20 Layer 3 validation. Domains here MUST round-trip through the compiled SDBL v3 binary with their `expectedMinBitmap` bits set. The bit numbers correspond to `categoryIndex` in blocklist-sources.json. Add more canaries by editing this file — see docs/drift-runbook.md (TBD) for selection criteria.

canaries.rationale: Per issue #20: present in HaGeZi pro.plus.txt (bit 3, value 8) and ultimate.txt (bit 4, value 16) — combined 0b11000 = 24. The exact regression canary: production shipped with bit 4 missing, so 'Ultimate Protection' users observed doubleclick.net unblocked. This canary fails if either bit is dropped from the artifact.
Same upstream presence as doubleclick.net (HaGeZi pro.plus + ultimate). Distinct trie path — catches builder bugs that affect only certain prefixes.
